x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Untracked customizations create invisible conflicts with Now Assist configurations during upgrades. High uncaptured change rates indicate customization discipline gaps that can break Now Assist enablement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enforce update set discipline by creating application-specific update sets for all customizations. Navigate to sys_update_set_list.do to review current update sets. All Now Assist configuration changes must be tracked in update sets.
